name: Red Roses Bouquet
shortDescription: Classic red roses for a special gift.
fullDescription: A beautiful bouquet of fresh red roses. It is a perfect choice for romantic moments, birthdays, anniversaries or elegant gifts.

name: Hydrangea Bouquet
shortDescription: Soft hydrangeas in pastel colors.
fullDescription: A delicate bouquet with hydrangeas. It looks gentle, elegant and is suitable for birthdays, family celebrations or stylish home decoration.

name: White Chrysanthemums
shortDescription: Fresh white chrysanthemums with greenery.
fullDescription: A light and elegant bouquet of white chrysanthemums. This bouquet is simple, fresh and suitable for many occasions.

name: White Roses Bouquet
shortDescription: Elegant white roses for a clean look.
fullDescription: A refined bouquet of white roses. It creates a calm and elegant impression and is perfect for gifts, celebrations and important events.

name: Wedding Lilies
shortDescription: Elegant lilies for wedding ceremonies.
fullDescription: A wedding bouquet with fresh lilies. It looks graceful and luxurious, making it suitable for bridal bouquets and wedding decorations.

name: Camellia Bouquet
shortDescription: Romantic camellias for special events.
fullDescription: A delicate camellia bouquet created for elegant celebrations. It adds tenderness and sophistication to a wedding style.

name: Eustoma Bouquet
shortDescription: Soft eustoma flowers for a gentle look.
fullDescription: A light bouquet with eustoma flowers. It is perfect for a romantic wedding, photo session or delicate floral decoration.

name: Daisy Wedding Mix
shortDescription: Simple daisies for a natural wedding style.
fullDescription: A fresh bouquet with daisies and light greenery. It is ideal for rustic, summer or minimal wedding themes.

name: Anemones
shortDescription: Stylish anemones with expressive petals.
fullDescription: A seasonal bouquet with anemones. These flowers look unusual and elegant, making them perfect for modern floral arrangements.

name: Tulips
shortDescription: Fresh tulips for spring mood.
fullDescription: A colorful bouquet of fresh tulips. It is light, cheerful and perfect for spring gifts or home decoration.

name: Ranunculus
shortDescription: Delicate ranunculus flowers in soft shades.
fullDescription: A bouquet with ranunculus flowers. Their layered petals create a romantic and elegant look for seasonal arrangements.

name: Peonies
shortDescription: Large soft peonies for a luxurious bouquet.
fullDescription: A beautiful seasonal bouquet with peonies. These flowers look rich, soft and romantic, especially for spring and summer gifts.

name: Cactus Set
shortDescription: Small cactus plants for decoration.
fullDescription: A cute set of cactus plants. They are easy to care for and perfect for desks, shelves and small home spaces.

name: Orchid Pot
shortDescription: Elegant orchid in a decorative pot.
fullDescription: A beautiful orchid in a pot. It is a long-lasting gift and a stylish decoration for a room, office or reception area.

name: Fern
shortDescription: Fresh green fern for natural interiors.
fullDescription: A decorative indoor fern with soft green leaves. It adds freshness and a natural atmosphere to any interior.

name: Ficus
shortDescription: Stylish ficus plant for home or office.
fullDescription: A ficus plant with beautiful green leaves. It is suitable for home, office and modern interior decoration.

name: Cards and Envelopes
shortDescription: Mini cards, wish cards and money envelopes.
fullDescription: Author mini-cards with spring watercolor illustrations, cards for warm wishes and elegant envelopes for money gifts.

name: Home Fragrance
shortDescription: Soy candles, diffusers and interior perfumes.
fullDescription: Aesthetic soy candles in glass, reed diffusers with sticks and interior perfumes for creating a cozy atmosphere at home.

name: Sweets Box
shortDescription: Chocolate, macarons and premium candies.
fullDescription: A sweet gift set with craft chocolate, colorful macarons, premium candy boxes or healthy nut pastes.

name: Stylish Vase
shortDescription: Glass or ceramic vase for bouquets.
fullDescription: A minimal glass or ceramic vase that perfectly matches flower bouquets and can become a stylish part of home decor.
